entity.label: Mahath
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Another Kohathite Levite, of the time of Hezekiah (2 Chr. 29:12).

nodes.label: Mahath
nodes.description: Another Kohathite Levite, of the time of Hezekiah (2 Chr. 29:12).

nodes.label: Amasai
nodes.description: The father of a Levite, one of the two Kohathites who took a prominent part at the instance of Hezekiah in the cleansing of the temple (2 Chr. 29:12).

verses.text: Then the Levites arose, Mahath the son of Amasai, and Joel the son of Azariah, of the sons of the Kohathites: and of the sons of Merari, Kish the son of Abdi, and Azariah the son of Jehalelel: and of the Gershonites; Joah the son of Zimmah, and Eden the son of Joah:
